### 【YouTube】[《天津地铁模组 教程介绍 - Minecraft Transit Railway拓展模组》](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B1wPwJmtjn8&list=PLzxdvYevO_3uSYEuZwEr4ggGilyoL-m0A)

# Please Read!

_Please read the following and back up your worlds before downloading!_

Tianjin Metro mod is an expanding mod for Minecraft Transit Railway, which contains various things from Tianjin Metro in real life.

* [Minecraft Transit Railway 4.0.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway/) is REQUIRED.
* [Filters API](https://modrinth.com/mod/filters-api) is REQUIRED.

This mod **will not** be updated for any older Minecraft or MTR. The source code is publicly available on GitHub, so you are free to do it yourself.

**Download "SERVER" branch if you are installing it to your server.**

## Translation
Tianjin Metro mod is being translated using [ZiYue Weblate](https://weblate.ziyuesinicization.site/engage/tianjin-metro/). ZiYue Weblate is a self-hosted Weblate, a web tool designed to ease translating for both developers and translators.

[https://weblate.ziyuesinicization.site/engage/tianjin-metro/](https://weblate.ziyuesinicization.site/engage/tianjin-metro/)

[![](https://weblate.ziyuesinicization.site/widget/tianjin-metro/en_us-json/multi-auto.svg)](https://weblate.ziyuesinicization.site/engage/tianjin-metro/)
